title: Moniepoint, SMEDAN set to launch Nigeria’s Informal Economy Report in Abuja - FinancialEDGE
description: Africa’s fastest growing financial institution according to the Financial Times, Moniepoint MfB in conjunction with the Ministry of Industry, Trade, and Investment, and Small and Medium Enterprise Development Agency of Nigeria, SMEDAN is set for the launch of Nigeria's Informal Economy Report 2024 holding in Abuja on the 5th of July 2024 at the Abuja
html: Africa’s fastest growing financial institution according to the Financial Times, Moniepoint MfB in conjunction with the Ministry of Industry, Trade, and Investment, and Small and Medium Enterprise Development Agency of Nigeria, SMEDAN  is set for the launch of Nigeria’s Informal Economy Report 2024 holding in Abuja on the 5th of July 2024 at the Abuja Continental Hotel.
